definition:
1. a walking about, walking , (Plato Philosophus), etc. 
2. a place for walking, a covered walk , (Xenophon Historicus) 
3. discourse during a walk, a philosophical discussion , (Aristophanes Comicus) 
4. οἱ ἐκ τοῦ περιπάτου the Peripatetics, school of Aristotle , because he taught walking in a  περίπατος of the Lyceum  at Athens, (Plutarch), etc. (ML)
